messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Is Socrates considered the author of the Symposium?

No, Socrates is not the author of the Symposium (會飲篇). The Symposium was written by Plato. While Socrates appears as a central character in the dialogue, Socrates himself left no written works — everything attributed to him comes through the writings of others, primarily Plato and Xenophon.
